sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'A', 10), (2, 'B', NULL), (3, 'C', 30);
UPDATE test_table SET value = any_value(value) WHERE name = 'B';
SELECT id, any_value(name) AS name_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
SELECT any_value(value) FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
